module_design.design_summary: Change the default value for jm column letter in _cli_main from "G" (col 7, numeric employee IDs) to "KJ" (col 296, Project Manager English names). Single-line change in main.py L180.
module_design.interface_contract: Input: excel_b_columns dict from config (may or may not contain "jm" key) Output: jm_col_letter passed to lookup_order_lines() — default "KJ" when key absent Validation: "KJ" is validated by _col_to_idx() downstream; no additional validation needed here
module_design.implementation_plan: 1. In main.py _cli_main, locate: excel_b_columns.get("jm", "G") 2. Replace default "G" with "KJ" 3. No other changes required
module_design.verification_plan: T3 acceptance test: source of main.py must contain .get("jm", "KJ") string Manual check: grep for .get("jm", confirms KJ not G

risks.risk: None — single string literal change; "KJ" is a valid Excel column letter validated downstream by _col_to_idx()
